title: veronica pareora
intro: Veronica pareora, also known as the New Zealand broom, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Veronica pareora can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
